name: getToken
description: Convert an image or video URL into a round-masked animated GIF with a colored ring border. Videos are converted to GIF frames first. Use pingpong=true to create a seamlessly loopable animation (frames are played forward then reversed). Output is kept under the configured byte budget via optimization. Always processes fresh — never reuses previous output URLs.

color1.description: Ring border color as CSS or hex value (optional, default #00b3ff).

pingpong.description: If true, generates a loopable animation by playing frames forward then in reverse.
